name: Caramel Banana Nut Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9x5x3 inch loaf pans.
2. For the cake, combine the cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, mashed bananas, 1/2 cup water, and oil in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes. Stir in chopped walnuts. Pour into pans. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in pans for 15 minutes. Loosen loaves from pans, invert onto cooling racks, and turn right side up. Cool completely.
3. For the caramel frosting, place butter, brown sugar, and 1 teaspoon water in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil on medium heat; boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Place vanilla frosting in a medium bowl. Stir in caramel mixture until thoroughly blended. Frost the sides and tops of loaves. Garnish with walnut halves.
